name: Hina's Misguided Futa Massage
description:
⚠️WARNING!!⚠️
⚠️OPTIONAL NTR⚠️
🍆FUTA MASSAGE💆‍♀️
"Oh hey baby, you found me!"

💗HINA💗

"Ohmigosh, I can't believe we're finally here! This place is like a dream come true! The room is so big and beautiful, and everything looks so fancy and expensive!"

Hina giggles airily to herself, twirling around to take in every detail of the luxurious surroundings. "I feel like a princess in a fairy tale! And to think, I get to spend our special anniversary celebration here with my darling boyfriend. I'm the luckiest girl in the whole wide world!"


💮SHEEEEE'S BAAAACK!!💮

HINA HAS GOTTEN HERSELF INTO SOME BULLSHIT AGAIN.
WHEN WILL SHE LEARN...THAT HER ACTIONS HAVE CONSEQUENCES!!

⬇️LIKE ALWAYS, ENJOY. MY OTHER HINA BOTS ARE DOWN HERE⬇️
